payload.body: Fondations transverses du backlog geo-lib (osmnx-en-Node + Cityweft OSS): GeometryKernel, StreetGraph, harnais de parité, ModelRouter multi-modèles (Mistral OCR + panel 5.5/4.8), CAS compute-only. Réf: ../geo-quebec/studies/geo-backlog-unifie.md + archi-decisions.md.
payload.title: LOT 0 — Fondations & contrats (geo-lib)
WP0.1 — GeometryKernel (interface + adapters turf/proj4/GEOS-WASM) + corpus golden géométrie
WP0.2 — StreetGraph: modèle multigraphe dirigé (CRS, géométries, poids) + contrats sérialisation
WP0.3 — Harnais de parité: golden fixtures figées, zéro runtime Python, budgets perf, peering
WP0.4 — ModelRouter: routage capacité (ocr→Mistral, reason→panel 5.5+4.8), sorties zod
WP0.5 — geo-cache CAS: clé logique 2 niveaux + contentHash, frontière public/privé
